row.name: 5XX Requests
row.documentation: Number of bot requests that returned an HTTP 5xx (server error) response.

row.name: Acquired visits
row.documentation: Visits that started after someone clicked from an AI chatbot (Referrers → AI Assistants).

row.name: Acquired visits
row.documentation: Visits that started after someone clicked from an AI chatbot (Referrers → AI Assistants).

row.name: Actions
row.documentation: The number of actions performed by your visitors. Actions can be page views, internal site searches, downloads or outlinks.

row.name: Actions per Visit
row.documentation: The average number of actions (page views, site searches, downloads or outlinks) that were performed during the visits.

row.name: Average value
row.documentation: The average of all values for this event

row.name: Avg. DOM completion time
row.documentation: Average time (in seconds) it takes for the browser to load media and execute any Javascript code listening for the DOMContentLoaded event after the webpage was loaded and the user can already interact with it.

row.name: Avg. DOM processing time
row.documentation: Average time (in seconds) the browser spends loading the webpage after the response was fully received and before the user can start interacting with it.

row.name: Avg. Response Size
row.documentation: Average size of the responses returned for these requests. This relies on server or CDN tracking and may be empty if it is not configured, or empty for a URL when none of its requests carried this data.

row.name: Avg. Server Time
row.documentation: Average time the server took to respond to these requests. This relies on server or CDN tracking and may be empty if it is not configured, or empty for a URL when none of its requests carried this data.

row.name: Avg. Time on Website
row.documentation: The average duration of a visit.

row.name: Avg. generation time
row.documentation: The average time it took to generate the page. This metric includes the time it took the server to generate the web page, plus the time it took for the visitor to download the response from the server. A lower 'Avg. generation time' means a faster website for your visitors!

row.name: Avg. network time
row.documentation: Average time (in seconds) it takes to connect to the server. This includes the time needed to lookup DNS and establish a TCP connection. This value might be 0 after the first request to a domain as the browser might cache the connection.

row.name: Avg. on load time
row.documentation: Average time (in seconds) it takes the browser to execute Javascript code waiting for the window.load event. This event is triggered once the DOM has completely rendered.

row.name: Avg. page load time
row.documentation: Average time (in seconds) it takes from requesting a page until the page is fully rendered within the browser

row.name: Avg. server time
row.documentation: Average time (in seconds) it takes the server to generate the page. This is the time between the server receiving the request and starting to serve the response.

row.name: Avg. time on page
row.documentation: The average amount of time visitors spent on this page (only the page, not the entire website).

row.name: Avg. transfer time
row.documentation: Average time (in seconds) it takes the browser to download the response from the server. This is the time from receiving the first byte till the response is complete.

row.name: Bounce Rate
row.documentation: The percentage of visits that only had a single pageview. This means, that the visitor left the website directly from the entrance page.

row.name: Bounces
row.documentation: Number of visits that started and ended on this page. This means that the visitor left the website after viewing only this page.

row.name: Click-through rate
row.documentation: Share of AI chatbot requests that resulted in acquired visits (acquired visits ÷ requests).

row.name: Clicked in search results
row.documentation: The number of times this Page was visited after a visitor did a search on your website, and clicked on this page in the search results.

row.name: Content Interactions
row.documentation: The number of times a content block was interacted with (eg, a 'click' on a banner or ad).

row.name: Conversion Rate
row.documentation: The percentage of visits that triggered a conversion. The conversion rate is calculated using the number of visits that converted at least one goal. Visits converting multiple goals are only counted once in the conversion rate.

row.name: Document Requests
row.documentation: Total number of bot requests to document URLs recorded during the selected period.

row.name: Downloads
row.documentation: The number of times this link was clicked.

row.name: Entrances
row.documentation: Number of visits that started on this page.

row.name: Event value
row.documentation: The sum of event values

row.name: Events
row.documentation: Total number of events

row.name: Events with a value
row.documentation: Number of events where an Event value was set

row.name: Exit rate
row.documentation: The percentage of visits that left the website after viewing this page.

row.name: Exits
row.documentation: Number of visits that ended on this page.

row.name: Hits
row.documentation: The total count of all interactions recorded on your website, including page views, link clicks, downloads, and events.

row.name: Impressions
row.documentation: The number of times a content block, such as a banner or an ad, was displayed on a page.

row.name: Interaction Rate
row.documentation: The ratio of content impressions to interactions.

row.name: Maximum Event value
row.documentation: The maximum value for this event

row.name: Minimum Event value
row.documentation: The minimum value for this event

row.name: Not found requests
row.documentation: Number of bot requests that returned an HTTP 404 or 410 response, including document URLs.

row.name: Outlinks
row.documentation: The number of times this link was clicked.

row.name: Page Not Found (404) Requests
row.documentation: Number of bot requests that returned an HTTP 404 (Not Found) or 410 (Gone) response.

row.name: Page Requests
row.documentation: Total number of bot requests to page URLs recorded during the selected period.

row.name: Pageviews
row.documentation: The number of times this page was visited.

row.name: Pageviews
row.documentation: The number of times this page was visited.

row.name: Product Revenue
row.documentation: The total revenue generated by Product sales. Excludes tax, shipping and discount.

row.name: Requests
row.documentation: Total number of bot requests recorded during the selected period. Includes both page and document URLs.

row.name: Requests
row.documentation: Total number of bot requests recorded during the selected period. Includes both page and document URLs.

row.name: Search Results pages
row.documentation: Visitors will search on your website, and sometimes click "next" to view more results. This is the average number of search results pages viewed for this keyword.

row.name: Searches
row.documentation: The number of visits that searched for this keyword on your website's search engine.

row.name: Server error (5xx) requests
row.documentation: Number of bot requests that returned an HTTP 5xx response, including document URLs.

row.name: Total Broken Requests
row.documentation: Number of bot requests that returned an HTTP 404 (Not Found), 410 (Gone), or 5xx (server error) response.

row.name: Unique AI chatbots
row.documentation: AI chatbot user agents detected during the selected period.

row.name: Unique Downloads
row.documentation: The number of visits that involved a click on this link. If a link was clicked multiple times during one visit, it is only counted once.

row.name: Unique Outlinks
row.documentation: The number of visits that involved a click on this link. If a link was clicked multiple times during one visit, it is only counted once.

row.name: Unique Pageviews
row.documentation: The number of visits that included this page. If a page was viewed multiple times during one visit, it is only counted once.

row.name: Unique document URLs
row.documentation: Distinct download or document URLs requested by AI chatbots.

row.name: Unique page URLs
row.documentation: Distinct page URLs requested by AI chatbots.

row.name: Unique visitors
row.documentation: The number of unduplicated visitors coming to your website. Every user is only counted once, even if they visit the website multiple times a day.

row.name: Users
row.documentation: The number of users logged in your website. It is the number of unique active users that have a User ID set (via the Tracking code function 'setUserId').

row.name: Visits
row.documentation: If a visitor comes to your website for the first time or if they visit a page more than 30 minutes after their last page view, this will be recorded as a new visit.

row.name: Visits with Conversions
row.documentation: Number of visits where at least one goal was successfully converted.
